name: Baron Axe
description: For the longest time, Aldorian nobles had been rather dismissive towards axes. Their perspective took a turn when the late King Etbert introduced a fashion for richly decorated axes, turning them into a symbol of power.
descriptionZh: 过去，人们始终认为斧子是农民用的兵器。先王埃特伯特将纹饰丰富的斧子用作权力的象征之后，人们很快便摒弃了这种观念。
